## [00:00 - 00:53]

Hey, you want to sell more of your stuff online? Who doesn't? All right, well, there's a book that can help you. I wrote it myself. It's called Convert 2.0, How to Create Internet Campaigns That Sell. It's a little different approach than what you might be thinking of. See, instead of trying to become the greatest salesperson in the world or become the best copywriter or using the greatest most advanced hacks and tactics, it takes a totally different approach, where you're basically being really, really friendly to people and causing them to be magnetically attracted to your brand and actually come to you wanting to buy before you ever even try to sell them anything. Works pretty well. And the book itself is really, really easy to read. You can knock it out in an afternoon and start creating campaigns right off the bat. It sounds interesting to you. Go ahead and check the little link by this video. Have a look at what's in the book. And if you like it, pick up a copy. I think it'll really help you. Thanks for watching. Take it easy.
